commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ffmpeg && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

if [ -f package.json ]; then if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --no-audit --no-fund; else npm install --no-audit --no-fund; fi; elif [ -f quickrec_web_server/package.json ]; then cd quickrec_web_server && if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --no-audit --no-fund; else npm install --no-audit --no-fund; fi; else echo "package.json not found in root or quickrec_web_server"; exit 1; fi

if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run build; elif [ -f quickrec_web_server/package.json ]; then cd quickrec_web_server && npm run build; else echo "package.json not found in root or quickrec_web_server"; exit 1; fi

deploy.startCommand: sh -lc 'if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run start; elif [ -f quickrec_web_server/package.json ]; then cd quickrec_web_server && npm run start; else echo "package.json not found in root or quickrec_web_server"; exit 1; fi'
